functions.name: test_empty_learning_log_view_returns_empty
functions.docstring: Test that EmptyLearningLogView always returns empty list.

functions.docstring: Test that EmptyLearningLogView returns empty even when organism has learning log.

functions.docstring: Test AncestorLearningLogView with root organism (no ancestors).

functions.docstring: Test AncestorLearningLogView with one level of ancestry.

functions.name: test_ancestor_learning_log_view_multiple_ancestors
functions.docstring: Test that all ancestor entries are collected.

functions.name: test_ancestor_learning_log_view_max_depth
functions.docstring: Test that max_depth limits ancestor traversal.

functions.name: test_ancestor_learning_log_view_max_depth_zero
functions.docstring: Test that max_depth=0 only includes the organism itself.

functions.name: test_ancestor_learning_log_view_no_entries
functions.docstring: Test when ancestors have no learning log entries.

functions.name: test_neighborhood_learning_log_view_with_siblings
functions.docstring: Test that neighborhood includes siblings (through parent).

functions.name: test_neighborhood_learning_log_view_large_distance
functions.docstring: Test with large max_distance traverses entire tree.

functions.name: test_neighborhood_learning_log_view_empty_entries

functions.name: test_neighborhood_learning_log_view_deep_tree
functions.docstring: Test neighborhood with deep tree structure.

functions.name: test_neighborhood_learning_log_view_branching_tree
functions.docstring: Test neighborhood with branching tree structure.

functions.name: test_learning_log_view_initialization
functions.docstring: Test that all learning log views can be initialized with population.
